description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped rock with a roughly rounded form and a slightly flattened base. Its surface is predominantly gray with subtle variations in tone, featuring patches of lighter and darker gray as well as faint brownish streaks. The texture appears coarse and rugged, with visible pitting and natural weathering, giving it an authentic, unpolished look. The rock's contours are uneven, with some areas bulging outward and others receding, creating a natural, organic silhouette. There are no visible markings, carvings, or artificial modifications on its surface. The overall appearance suggests it could serve as a natural barrier or decorative element in an urban park or landscaped area.
description: A medium-sized, irregular gray rock with a coarse, weathered surface and natural color variations. Its rugged texture and organic shape make it suitable as a barrier or decorative element in urban settings.
description_view_0: This view shows the rock's broadest face, highlighting its uneven, slightly angular top and a prominent bulge on the left side.
description_view_1: From this angle, the rock appears more rounded, with a smoother surface and less pronounced bulges, emphasizing its natural weathering.
description_view_2: This perspective reveals the rock's most spherical aspect, with subtle surface pitting and a generally uniform gray coloration.
description_view_3: Here, the rock's surface appears slightly lighter and more matte, with a gentle slope and less visible texture detail compared to other views.
attribute_location: urban park or landscaped sidewalk edge
